snapshot_requirements: hero owned-mount value including explicit null state
wolf model elements and native actions
all created Unity objects/components and parentage
movement Behaviour identities and enabled states

cases.expected: restore exact prior action instances/state or perform no discard before commit
restore every prior field value and remove all created objects/elements

cases.fault_point: after Object.Destroy requests before end-of-frame destruction
cases.expected: quiescent state is observed after destruction completes; no stale callback sees partially destroyed graph

cases.fault_point: movement component added, removed, destroyed or re-enabled while mounted
cases.expected: only exact captured components are controlled; unrelated and replacement components remain untouched

cases.fault_point: source mount disappears or mutates after shared MountData reference is assigned
cases.expected: documented ownership or immutable copy; no dangling/shared mutable contract

cases.fault_point: scene unload, hero replacement, wolf discard and plug-in unload at every conversion/mount step
cases.expected: single idempotent rollback restores pre-state or records a hard blocker
bounded allocations and time budgets for Tick and attach discovery

decision.reason: irreversible native-action discard, incomplete null ownership restoration and non-transactional object-graph mutation
